bands.description: Not yet productive. The issue is pre-productivity.

levels.label: Not Interested
levels.description: Shows no interest in work or tasks.

levels.label: Lacks Discipline
levels.description: Works only when instructed by a manager; lacks self-initiative.

levels.label: Motivated but Directionless
levels.description: Highly motivated but doesn't know where or how to focus efforts.
signals: Wants to help but doesn't know how

bands.description: Productive but not yet solving problems or building systems.

levels.label: Careless and Inconsistent
levels.description: Moderately productive but careless; needs better discipline to improve.

levels.label: Consistent Performer
levels.description: Meets required standards, serious about work, shows consistent productivity.

levels.label: Reliable and Productive
levels.description: Completes all assigned tasks efficiently and shows reliability in delivery.

bands.description: Problem identification and systems building. This is where the Fellow mandate lives.

levels.label: Problem Identifier
levels.description: Productive and consistently identifies problem areas or challenges that need attention.

levels.label: Problem Solver
levels.description: Identifies problems and proactively suggests creative and practical solutions.

levels.label: Innovative and Experimental
levels.description: Actively solves problems, experiments with solutions, and builds models or MVPs.

levels.label: Exceptional Performer
levels.description: Excels in identifying, solving, and executing solutions flawlessly.

criticalBoundary.description: 6 = excellent executor of tasks defined by others. 7 = identifies problems the supervisor hadn't articulated.
criticalBoundary.score6Example: He does everything I give him. I don't have to follow up. Very reliable.
criticalBoundary.score7Example: She noticed that our rejection rate goes up on Mondays and started tracking why.

assessmentDimensions.label: Driving Execution
assessmentDimensions.description: Getting things done on time, following up without reminders, initiating work

assessmentDimensions.label: Building Systems
assessmentDimensions.description: Creating tools, processes, trackers, SOPs that persist after the Fellow leaves

assessmentDimensions.label: KPI Impact
assessmentDimensions.description: Connecting work to measurable business outcomes

assessmentDimensions.label: Change Management
assessmentDimensions.description: Getting people to adopt new processes, handling resistance, building rapport

kpis.label: Lead Generation
kpis.description: New potential customers identified and contacted

kpis.label: Lead Conversion
kpis.description: Percentage of leads that become paying customers

kpis.label: Cross-selling
kpis.description: Selling additional products to existing customers

kpis.label: NPS
kpis.description: Customer satisfaction and likelihood to recommend

kpis.label: Quality
kpis.description: Defect rates, rejection rates, customer complaints
